{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Executors
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozriel]] was raising [[Executors]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Executors]] are beings that [[Ozriel]] suggests could be used to destroy [[Fiend]] summoners.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Sure would be a great time to have some Executors. Toss ‘em in, wait until the Fiend summoners are destroyed, and haul ‘em back. It’s like fishing!”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
